description: Trigger + expectation evals for the Macro Contrarian persona. Mandatory-dissent voice — CRE + late-cycle sector risk. Escalate-only authority.

positive.prompt: Should we underwrite this CRE loan given late-cycle indicators?
positive.reason: CRE + macro cycle is Contrarian core

positive.prompt: Rate-cut probability shifted — does that change our sector exposure thesis?
